meta.title: Arranto — Software Studio
meta.description: Start to running. Nothing left undone. Software studio, est. 2017.

home.studioBody: One engineer. AI-native by design. 10+ delivered projects. 118 verified reviews.

studio.heading: Arranto.
studio.statEstLabel: Founded in Gonda, India (originally Smile Fotilo)
studio.storyBody1: Founded in 2017 in Gonda, India (as Smile Fotilo), we have evolved into a premium, founder-led, AI-native software studio. We believe in absolute focus — one engineer building systems that scale globally. Our roots lie deep, but our products power critical systems in the Gulf, US, and Europe.
studio.storyBody2: Every line of code is written with a simple guarantee: start to running, with nothing left undone. We build boring, reliable infrastructure chosen for uptime and resilience, not novelty.
studio.ctaText: Ready to build something that lasts?

contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.name: name
contact.success: ✓ message queued — expect a reply within 48 hours.
contact.invalid: ✗ name, valid email, and a message are required.

legal.privacyBody: The contact form collects your name, email, and message — used only to reply to you. No ad pixels, no data brokers, no tracking beyond aggregate traffic counts.
legal.termsBody: Content on this site describes work delivered by Arranto. Product statuses are stated honestly — anything marked “in pilot” is not yet in production. All content © Arranto.
